user.title: Connect to CamillaDSP
user.description: Enter the base URL of your CamillaDSP backend (e.g. http://192.168.1.50:5005).

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to CamillaDSP at the specified URL.

abort.already_configured: This CamillaDSP instance is already configured.

reload_active_config.name: Reload active config
reload_active_config.description: Re-fetch and re-normalize the active config from the CamillaDSP backend, rebuilding all entity descriptors.

entry_id.name: Entry ID
entry_id.description: Config entry ID. Optional if only one CamillaDSP instance is configured.

validate_active_config.name: Validate active config
validate_active_config.description: Run backend validation on the currently cached config document.

entry_id.name: Entry ID
entry_id.description: Config entry ID. Optional if only one CamillaDSP instance is configured.

save_active_config.name: Save active config
save_active_config.description: Explicitly save the current cached config document to disk.

entry_id.name: Entry ID
entry_id.description: Config entry ID. Optional if only one CamillaDSP instance is configured.

set_active_config_file.name: Set active config file
set_active_config_file.description: Switch the active config file and reload entities.

entry_id.name: Entry ID
entry_id.description: Config entry ID. Optional if only one CamillaDSP instance is configured.

name.name: Config file name
name.description: The name of the stored config file to activate.

set_config_value.name: Set config value
set_config_value.description: Set a single value in the config document by path.

entry_id.name: Entry ID
entry_id.description: Config entry ID. Optional if only one CamillaDSP instance is configured.

path.name: Config path
path.description: Dot/bracket notation path in the config document.

value.name: Value
value.description: The value to set at the path.

save.name: Save to disk
save.description: Whether to persist the change to the config file.

batch_set_config_values.name: Batch set config values
batch_set_config_values.description: Apply multiple config value changes in a single transaction.

entry_id.name: Entry ID
entry_id.description: Config entry ID. Optional if only one CamillaDSP instance is configured.

operations.name: Operations
operations.description: List of path/value pairs to apply.

save.name: Save to disk
save.description: Whether to persist the changes to the config file.

add_config_node.name: Add config node
add_config_node.description: Add a filter, mixer, processor, or pipeline step to the config.

entry_id.name: Entry ID
entry_id.description: Config entry ID. Optional if only one CamillaDSP instance is configured.

section.name: Section
section.description: The config section to add to.

name.name: Name
name.description: Name for the new node. Required for filters, mixers, and processors.

data.name: Node data
data.description: The raw node definition as a dictionary.

save.name: Save to disk
save.description: Whether to persist the change to the config file.

remove_config_node.name: Remove config node
remove_config_node.description: Remove a named node or pipeline step from the config.

entry_id.name: Entry ID
entry_id.description: Config entry ID. Optional if only one CamillaDSP instance is configured.

path.name: Path
path.description: Path to the node to remove (e.g. 'filters.MyFilter' or 'pipeline[3]').

save.name: Save to disk
save.description: Whether to persist the change to the config file.

entry_not_found.message: No CamillaDSP entry found with the specified ID.

ambiguous_entry.message: Multiple CamillaDSP entries are configured. Please specify an entry_id.

no_config_loaded.message: No config document is currently loaded.

invalid_path.message: The specified config path is invalid or does not exist.

name_required.message: A name is required when adding to filters, mixers, or processors.

node_already_exists.message: A node with that name already exists in the specified section.
